---
title: Curriculum Vitae
date: 2026-02-21
title-block-banner: true
---

Download my CV in the format that best suits your needs:

### Academic CV (full)

- [English (PDF)](/cv/cv-en-academic.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [Deutsch (PDF)](/cv/cv-de-academic.pdf){target="_blank"}

### Industry CV (2-page summary)

- [English (PDF)](/cv/cv-en-industry.pdf){target="_blank"}
- [Deutsch (PDF)](/cv/cv-de-industry.pdf){target="_blank"}

---

<iframe src="/cv/cv-en-academic.pdf" style="width:100%; height:1200px;" frameborder="0"></iframe>
